meta.title: HSE Logistics & Transport — Driver Hours & Fatigue Review
meta.subtitle: Regional fleet, hours-of-service compliance
meta.author: HSE Logistics & Transport
meta.deid_notice: All drivers are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This review checks the regional fleet against driver hours-of-service and fatigue-management rules. Two route patterns breach the daily driving limit and require rescheduling.

sections.caption: Hours-of-service compliance — driving time vs limit by route

rows.title: Long-haul route exceeds daily driving limit
rows.description: R-204 averages 10.2 h driving against a 9 h limit, raising fatigue risk.

rows.title: Night run near continuous-driving ceiling
rows.description: R-305 night run runs close to the limit during the circadian low.

rows.control: Split R-204 into a two-driver relay
Fatigue-risk rostering rules in the scheduling system

rows.action: Reschedule R-204 to remove the daily-limit breach
Pilot in-cab fatigue detection on night routes

sections.text: No driver may be rostered on R-204 at the current duration until the relay split is in place.
